post_mortem: PR #729 merged with 6 failing checks because verify-ci-policy-applied.mjs exited 0 (success) when live branch protection was missing required contexts
root_cause: verify-ci-policy-applied.mjs called process.exit(0) in two error branches: (1) branch protection not applied, (2) live protection missing required contexts

changes.fix: Changed process.exit(0) → process.exit(1) for missing-contexts and unprotected-branch conditions; added MANDATORY_CHECKS constant enforced at both config-baseline and live-API layers
Added pass-8-smoke-verify / pass-8 to required contexts (was missing)
Added 'Assert all mandatory checks present in config' step with hard-coded mandatory list as independent safety net

evidence_note: NV-29-CLOSE 2026-06-26: allowed_files backfilled with verified on-main artifacts (registry was blank; feature already built).
